title: Regulatory Capital Rules, Liquidity Coverage Ratio: Interim Final Revisions to the Definition of Qualifying Master Netting Agreement and Related Definitions
abstract: The OCC and Board (collectively, the agencies) invite comment on an interim final rule that amends the definition of "qualifying master netting agreement" under the regulatory capital rules, and the liquidity coverage ratio rule, as well as under the lending limits rule applicable to national banks and Federal savings associations. The agencies also are proposing to amend the definitions of "collateral agreement," "eligible margin loan," and "repo-style transaction" under the regulatory capital
action: Interim final rule with request for comment.
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
